verdict_summary: proceed — gamified savings has strong potential but needs phased rollout with 3 distinct solution tracks

convergence.finding: Deal Hunter segment is large (28% MAU) and under-converted to Pro (8% of Pro base)
Current trial-to-paid conversion (37%) has clear improvement headroom with better value demonstration

counter_signals.summary: Competitor gamification shows declining engagement after 60 days — novelty wears off without deeper value

side_a.position: Savings streaks create lasting habits when tied to real financial benefit
side_a.evidence: Prototype testing showed high engagement with visible savings accumulation

side_b.position: Gamification features decay in engagement after 60 days across all regional competitors
side_b.evidence: Competitive analysis of Careem Plus and Noon VIP programs

conflicts.resolution: Phase 1 focuses on financial transparency (real savings), not gamification mechanics — test whether value visibility alone drives retention before adding game layers

strongest_signal.summary: Deal Hunter segment (28% MAU) is heavily under-converted to Pro (8%)

strongest_counter_signal.summary: Competitor gamification features show declining engagement after 60 days

artifacts.description: Market sizing and competitive landscape for gamified loyalty

rationale: The Deal Hunter segment represents a large, under-converted audience for Pro. Current trial-to-paid conversion (37%) has clear headroom. While gamification longevity is a risk (competitor data shows 60-day decay), phasing the approach — starting with savings transparency before adding game mechanics — mitigates this. Three solution tracks identified with clear sequencing.
expected_impact: 8,400+ additional Pro subscribers per quarter in UAE, with potential 2x across GCC markets.
estimated_effort: Phase 1: 3-4 sprints. Phase 2: 4-6 sprints. Phase 3: 6-8 sprints.

solutions.title: Pro Savings Dashboard — real-time visibility into Pro savings
solutions.description: Add a savings dashboard to the Pro subscription screen showing cumulative savings from free delivery, cashback, and exclusive deals. No gamification — pure financial transparency.
solutions.rationale: Low effort, high signal. Tests whether value visibility alone improves trial-to-paid conversion before investing in gamification.

solutions.title: 30-Day Savings Streak — gamified daily savings challenge
solutions.description: Introduce a 30-day savings streak mechanic where users earn bonus cashback for consecutive days of Pro usage. Includes streak recovery and milestone rewards.
solutions.rationale: High potential but depends on sol-001 results. Only proceed if savings dashboard shows >3% conversion lift, confirming value visibility drives behavior.
solutions.expected_impact: 10-15% improvement in 90-day retention for engaged users

solutions.title: Social Savings Leaderboard — competitive savings ranking among friends
solutions.description: Add a social layer where Pro subscribers can see how their savings compare to friends. Requires social graph integration and privacy controls.
solutions.rationale: Highest potential impact but requires social graph infrastructure that doesn't exist. Defer until sol-001 and sol-002 validate the savings-as-motivation hypothesis.
solutions.expected_impact: Potential 20%+ Pro adoption increase if savings motivation is validated
